About.introduction: Software Developer with a hybrid profile combining Full Stack development and DevOps/SRE practices. I build and maintain scalable, reliable systems, contributing across software development, infrastructure, and automation. Experienced working in production environments with real users (30,000+), I’m comfortable moving between frontend, backend, and infrastructure depending on project needs. I have a strong Linux background, using it as my primary operating system since 2015.
About.about-website-technologies: The technologies used are Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Remark and next-intl.

Resume.job3-responsibility-1-1: Design and implementation of CI/CD pipelines in GitLab to automate linting, testing, build, and deployment.
Resume.job3-responsibility-1-2: Incident monitoring and triage via Sentry alerts, reducing noise and improving response to critical production issues.
Resume.job3-responsibility-1-3: Task automation using Bash scripts (dependency installation, environment setup, etc.).
Resume.job3-responsibility-2-1: Development of custom DHL Shopify applications with 30,000+ users using Meteor, TypeScript, React.js, Express.js, GraphQL, and MongoDB.
Resume.job3-responsibility-2-2: Unit and application testing with Mocha and Chai, and end-to-end testing with Cypress.
Resume.job3-responsibility-2-3: Development and maintenance of a monorepo with multiple microservices, optimizing development, testing, and deployment workflows between interdependent services.
Resume.job3-responsibility-2-4: Code review in merge requests, contributing to code quality and production stability.
Resume.job2-responsibility-1: Development of an AI platform using WordPress, JavaScript, PHP, HTML and CSS.
Resume.job1-responsibility-1: Front-end development of a platform for students using Next.js, React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
Resume.job1-responsibility-2: Front-end development of landing pages with Vite, React, Tailwind CSS and TypeScript.
Resume.job1-responsibility-3: Back-end development for web scraping using Express.js, JavaScript, SQLite and Puppeteer.
Resume.job1-responsibility-4: Back-end development with Nest.js, Docker, TypeORM and MySQL in training projects.
Resume.education1-description: I'm currently pursuing a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science at the University of the People, which allows me to study at my own pace while continuing to work full-time.
Resume.certification3-name: Introduction to DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering (LFS162)

Projects.project1-description: A personal homelab for experimenting with DevOps, SRE, and Linux tools on physical hardware.
Projects.project2-description: Scripts and tools for monitoring the use of RAM/CPU in Linux systems.
Projects.project2-technologies: Bash, Docker, GitHub Actions, Prometheus, Grafana
Projects.project3-description: Web platform for people interested or working in IT.
